name: Chicken Papriksha
recipeIngredient: 1 can (14 oz) cream of mushroom soup, undiluted
recipeInstructions:
1. Season the chicken well with salt, pepper, and paprika on both sides.
2. In a large frying pan with a lid, melt some margarine over medium heat.
3. Sauté the chicken pieces until they are well browned.
4. Add 1/2 cup of water (or less if necessary) to the pan and cover it.
5. Let the mixture cook for 15 minutes.
6. Stir in the soup and sour cream, mixing well with the juices from the chicken.
7. Continue cooking for a few more minutes until heated through.
8. Serve hot with butter noodles or your preferred side dish.
